strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — well exceeds the 15-year minimum
Active entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective and built AI-agent infrastructure including MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated community leadership through public talks, workshops, and open-source library contributions (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, vibe.dav)
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent (April 2025 only); no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, and the undergraduate background is split between Computer Science and Fine Arts

Career trajectory and titles (Senior/Staff Developer) reflect an individual technical contributor rather than a Director-level strategist who advises enterprise customers and shapes platform direction

key_factors.factor: Breadth and longevity of engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine engineering range and an entrepreneurial streak, but the role demands recognized AI expertise and Director-level strategic influence that his profile does not yet reflect. His AI work is limited to a few months of agentic tooling at his current employer, with no history of building or shipping AI platforms at scale, no advanced AI-related credentials, and a career pattern of senior individual contributor delivery rather than the external thought leadership, customer advisory, and cross-organizational strategy that define this position.
